courseleaf.title: English, Master of Arts
courseleaf.informationtext:
Zinzi Clemmons, Ph.D., Graduate Director

Graduate Study

The department offers an M.A. in Literature en route to the Ph.D. Detailed information may be obtained from the graduate advisor or the Chairperson of the Department.

Advising

Viktor Pertl, Graduate Program Advisor

Degree Requirements & Program Coordinator

See English.
